description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Packages that runs on push and pull request events, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have QT_VERSION and QTCREATOR_VERSION environment variables set to 5.15.1 and 4.13.1 respectively. It should have two jobs: one for building Tiled.AppImage on ubuntu-16.04 and another for building Tiled.app on macOS. Each job should checkout the repository, install dependencies, install Qt, setup Qbs, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact.
